session.os_version: Darwin Kernel Version 25.5.0: Mon Apr 27 20:38:56 PDT 2026; root:xnu-12377.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6000
session.model_label: Llama 3.2 (1B) — Meta, general language, very small

log.prompt: Describe the feeling of standing at the edge of a vast, dark ocean at night, in two or three sentences.
log.response: The air is heavy with an almost palpable sense of mystery as you stand at the edge of the dark ocean, its waves lapping gently against the shore like a slow and ominous heartbeat. The stars above are distant but seem to twinkle with an otherworldly light, casting an ethereal glow over the desolate landscape. As your gaze drifts out into the void, the only sound is the faint whisper of the wind through the trees, creating an eerie silence that seems to swallow all sound and leave you with an unshakeable sense of awe.
